agentFlow.responsibility: 从 HF Daily、Papers with Code、arXiv、OpenReview、ACL、CVF 和公司研究页发现候选论文。
保留 sourceUrl、paperUrl、abstract、sourceSignals、focusTopics 和版本号，避免只看标题判断。
按岗位相关性、架构价值、实用性、新颖性、评估质量、面试表达和可构建性打分。
只对 1-2 篇高价值论文做教授式深读，讲清好设计、坏设计和可迁移模式。
用 validate 脚本检查 trace、daily 输出、review 字段和中文编码。
agentFlow.signal: npm run validate is the quality gate

agentFlow.responsibility: 把 daily radar 摘要发布到 public/data/paper-radar.json，供前端展示。
保存 candidates、triage、reviewed 和 daily 文件，后续复用思路架构。

daily output keeps at most three skim papers
triage top list stays small and present
daily output includes professor learning fields

attached review reaches teaching-depth bar

reflection.summary: Reflection found 4 watch item(s); keep the feed small and evidence-led.
whatWorked: Must-read selected with score 97: Auditing Agent Harness Safety
4 selected paper(s) carried agent harness / observability signals.
0 reviewed paper file(s) are available for teaching-oriented reuse.
whatToWatch: Average review depth is 0; do not promote weak reviews into Articles.
114 papers were below top cutoff; inspect if emerging concepts are being crowded out.
selfCorrections: Do not treat fresh or hot as sufficient quality evidence; freshness only earns attention, not promotion.
Benchmark and evaluation papers must be read through claims, controlled variables, metrics, and failure modes.
A paper is only Articles-worthy when it teaches a reusable AI engineer pattern, not merely because it is about AI.
nextRunAdjustments: Keep AHE rescue enabled, but prefer papers with concrete harness/eval evidence.
Run review with DeepSeek Pro before using this radar as an Articles source.
If a review lacks good/bad/transferable patterns, rerun review with stricter professor prompt instead of publishing a shallow analysis.
